args.code: function irregularGridPack(gx,gy,ps){const b=[];for(let x=0;x<gx;x++)b.push(new Array(gy).fill(1));const r=[];function tp(x,y,w,h){if(x+w>gx||y+h>gy)return false;for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)if(b[xc][yc]===0)return false;return true;}function oc(x,y,w,h){for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)b[xc][yc]=0;}for(const p of ps){const sx=p.sizesArrX||[1],sy=p.sizesArrY||[1];for(let x=0;x<gx;x++)for(let y=0;y<gy;y++){const w=sx[Math.floor(Math.random()*sx.length)],h=sy[Math.floor(Math.random()*sy.length)];if(tp(x,y,w,h)){oc(x,y,w,h);r.push({x,y,w,h});}}}return r;}function drawAtlasIcon(name,cx,cy,size,color){const ctx=drawingContext;const s=size/24;ctx.save();ctx.translate(cx-size/2,cy-size/2);ctx.scale(s,s);const c=typeof color==='string'?color:('rgb('+color[0]+','+color[1]+','+color[2]+')');ctx.strokeStyle=c;ctx.fillStyle=c;ctx.lineWidth=2/s;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.lineJoin='round';const icons={"chart-bar":()=>{ctx.beginPath();ctx.fillRect(3,14,4,7);ctx.fillRect(10,9,4,12);ctx.fillRect(17,4,4,17);ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(2,22);ctx.lineTo(22,22);ctx.strokeStyle=c;ctx.lineWidth=1.5/s;ctx.stroke();},'arrow-up':()=>{ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(12,19);ctx.lineTo(12,5);ctx.moveTo(6,11);ctx.lineTo(12,5);ctx.lineTo(18,11);ctx.lineWidth=2/s;ctx.stroke();},'star':()=>{ctx.beginPath();const pts=5,r1=9,r2=4,cx2=12,cy2=12;for(let i=0;i<pts*2;i++){const a=Math.PI/pts*i-Math.PI/2,r=i%2===0?r1:r2;ctx.lineTo(cx2+Math.cos(a)*r,cy2+Math.sin(a)*r);}ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();},'lightning':()=>{ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(13,2);ctx.lineTo(6,13);ctx.lineTo(11,13);ctx.lineTo(9,22);ctx.lineTo(18,10);ctx.lineTo(13,10);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();}};if(icons[name])icons[name]();ctx.restore();}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const pad=18,cornerR=10;const heroX=pad,heroY=pad,heroW=600-pad*2,heroH=160;noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],22);rect(heroX,heroY,heroW,heroH,cornerR);drawingContext.font='900 72px Inter, sans-serif';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('$3.4M',210,pad+heroH/2);drawAtlasIcon('arrow-up',390,pad+heroH/2-18,40,[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]]);drawingContext.font='700 38px Inter, sans-serif';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('+127% YoY',410,pad+heroH/2-12);drawingContext.font='500 14px Inter, sans-serif';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',0.65)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('Q3 Revenue',210,pad+heroH*0.82);drawingContext.fillText('Growth Rate',480,pad+heroH*0.82);const barData=[{q:'Q1',v:0.38},{q:'Q2',v:0.61},{q:'Q3',v:1.0}];const chartX=pad,chartY=pad+heroH+16,chartW=600-pad*2,chartH=360-chartY-pad;const maxBarH=chartH-36;const barW=60,barGap=(chartW-barData.length*barW)/(barData.length+1);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],12);rect(chartX,chartY,chartW,chartH,cornerR);drawingContext.font='600 13px Inter, sans-serif';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',0.5)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='top';const qLabels=['Q1','Q2','Q3 ★'];const qVals=['$1.5M','$2.4M','$3.4M'];for(let i=0;i<barData.length;i++){const bx=chartX+barGap+(i*(barW+barGap));const bh=barData[i].v*maxBarH;const by=chartY+chartH-bh-28;const alpha=i===2?255:120;fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],alpha);noStroke();rect(bx,by,barW,bh,6,6,0,0);drawingContext.font=i===2?'700 13px Inter':'500 13px 13px Inter':'400 13px Inter';drawingContext.textBaseline='top';drawingContext.fillText(qLabels[i],bx+barW/2,chartY+chartH-24);}drawAtlasIcon('star',chartX+barGap+2*(barW+barGap)+barW/2,chartY+chartH-24-12,16,[fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]]);drawingContext.font='500 11px Inter, sans-serif';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',0.38)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='bottom';drawingContext.fillText('Strongest quarter on record',300,360-4);}

args.code: function irregularGridPack(gx,gy,ps){const b=[];for(let x=0;x<gx;x++)b.push(new Array(gy).fill(1));const r=[];function tp(x,y,w,h){if(x+w>gx||y+h>gy)return false;for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)if(b[xc][yc]===0)return false;return true;}function oc(x,y,w,h){for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)b[xc][yc]=0;}for(const p of ps){const sx=p.sizesArrX||[1],sy=p.sizesArrY||[1];let placed=0;const target=p.count||999;for(let y=0;y<gy&&placed<target;y++)for(let x=0;x<gx&&placed<target;x++){const w=sx[0],h=sy[0];if(tp(x,y,w,h)){oc(x,y,w,h);r.push({x,y,w,h,tier:p.tier||0});placed++;}}}return r;}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette.bg;const fg=window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor;background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const cellW=600/12;const cellH=360/6;const pad=6;const rects=irregularGridPack(12,6,[{sizesArrX:[6],sizesArrY:[4],count:1,tier:0},{sizesArrX:[3],sizesArrY:[2],count:2,tier:1},{sizesArrX:[3],sizesArrY:[2],count:2,tier:2},{sizesArrX:[3],sizesArrY:[2],count:4,tier:3}]);const labels=[['$3.4M','Q3 Revenue'],['127%','YoY Growth'],['Record','Quarter'],['Q1','$1.1M'],['Q2','$1.9M'],['',''],['',''],['','']];stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(1.5);for(let i=0;i<Math.min(rects.length,labels.length);i++){const rect_=rects[i];const px=rect_.x*cellW+pad;const py=rect_.y*cellH+pad;const pw=rect_.w*cellW-pad*2;const ph=rect_.h*cellH-pad*2;const alpha=rect_.tier===0?220:(rect_.tier===1?180:(rect_.tier===2?140:100));fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],alpha*0.18);stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(rect_.tier===0?2:1.2);rect(px,py,pw,ph,8);noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);textFont('IBM Plex Mono');const mainLabel=labels[i][0]||'';const subLabel=labels[i][1]||'';if(rect_.tier===0){drawingContext.font='700 52px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText(mainLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2-14);drawingContext.font='500 15px Inter';drawingContext.fillText(subLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2+28);}else if(rect_.tier===1){drawingContext.font='700 28px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText(mainLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2-10);drawingContext.font='400 13px Inter';drawingContext.fillText(subLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2+14);}else if(rect_.tier===2){drawingContext.font='700 22px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText(mainLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2-8);drawingContext.font='400 12px Inter';drawingContext.fillText(subLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2+10);}else{drawingContext.font='600 14px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText(mainLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2-7);drawingContext.font='400 11px Inter';drawingContext.fillText(subLabel,px+pw/2,py+ph/2+7);}drawAtlasIcon(i===0?'chart-bar':(i===1?'arrow-up':(i===2?'star':(i===3?'chart-bar':'chart-bar'))),px+pw-20,py+16,16,fg);}const growthBarY=360-0;const barH=4;const barW=600;const growthFrac=0.74;noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],60);rect(0,356,600,4,0);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],200);rect(0,356,600*growthFrac,4,0);}

args.code: function irregularGridPack(gx,gy,ps){const b=[];for(let x=0;x<gx;x++)b.push(new Array(gy).fill(1));const r=[];function tp(x,y,w,h){if(x+w>gx||y+h>gy)return false;for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)if(b[xc][yc]===0)return false;return true;}function oc(x,y,w,h){for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)b[xc][yc]=0;}for(const p of ps){const sx=p.sizesArrX||[1],sy=p.sizesArrY||[1];let placed=false;for(let x=0;x<gx&&!placed;x++)for(let y=0;y<gy&&!placed;y++){const w=sx[0],h=sy[0];if(tp(x,y,w,h)){oc(x,y,w,h);r.push({x,y,w,h,label:p.label||'',sub:p.sub||''});placed=true;}}}return r;}function drawAtlasIcon(name,cx,cy,sz,col){const ctx=drawingContext;ctx.save();ctx.strokeStyle=col;ctx.fillStyle=col;ctx.lineWidth=sz/24;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.lineJoin='round';const s=sz/24,tx=cx-sz/2,ty=cy-sz/2;ctx.translate(tx,ty);ctx.scale(s,s);ctx.beginPath();if(name==='chart-bar'){ctx.strokeStyle=col;ctx.fillStyle='none';ctx.strokeRect(2,2,20,20);ctx.fillStyle=col;ctx.fillRect(6,14,3,6);ctx.fillRect(11,10,3,10);ctx.fillRect(16,6,3,14);}else if(name==='arrow-up'){ctx.moveTo(12,20);ctx.lineTo(12,4);ctx.moveTo(6,10);ctx.lineTo(12,4);ctx.moveTo(18,10);ctx.lineTo(12,4);ctx.stroke();}else if(name==='star'){ctx.moveTo(12,2);ctx.lineTo(15.09,8.26);ctx.lineTo(22,9.27);ctx.lineTo(17,14.14);ctx.lineTo(18.18,21.02);ctx.lineTo(12,17.77);ctx.lineTo(5.82,21.02);ctx.lineTo(7,14.14);ctx.lineTo(2,9.27);ctx.lineTo(8.91,8.26);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();}else if(name==='lightning'){ctx.moveTo(13,2);ctx.lineTo(4,14);ctx.lineTo(11,14);ctx.lineTo(11,22);ctx.lineTo(20,10);ctx.lineTo(13,10);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();}else if(name==='users'){ctx.arc(8,7,4,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.moveTo(1,21);ctx.arc(8,17,5,Math.PI,0);ctx.moveTo(17,7);ctx.arc(17,7,4,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.moveTo(23,21);ctx.arc(17,17,5,Math.PI,0);ctx.stroke();}ctx.restore();}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const pad=18,gap=10;const heroH=200,heroW=600-pad*2;const col1=heroW*0.58-gap/2,col2=heroW-col1-gap;const rowB=360-pad-heroH-gap,rowBH=heroH-80;noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(1.5);rect(pad,pad,heroW,heroH,10);rect(pad,pad+heroH+gap,col1,rowBH,10);rect(pad+col1+gap,pad+heroH+gap,col2,rowBH,10);noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);drawingContext.font='900 72px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText('$3.4M',pad+heroW/2,pad+heroH/2-12);drawingContext.font='600 22px Inter';drawingContext.fillText('Q3 Revenue — Strongest Quarter on leftX=pad+col1/2,leftY=pad+heroH+gap+rowBH/2;drawAtlasIcon('arrow-up',leftX,leftY-28,40,'rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')');drawingContext.font='700 44px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('+127%',leftX,leftY+14);drawingContext.font='500 15px Inter';drawingContext.fillText('Year over Year Growth',leftX,leftY+46);const rightX=pad+col1+gap+col2/2,rightY=leftY;drawAtlasIcon('lightning',rightX,rightY-28,36,'rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')');drawingContext.font='700 36px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('YoY Best',rightX,rightY+14);drawingContext.font='500 14px Inter';drawingContext.fillText('Record quarter in company history',rightX,rightY+46);}

w=sx[Math.floor(Math.random()*sx.length)],h=sy[Math.floor(Math.random()*sy.length)];if(tp(x,y,w,h)){oc(x,y,w,h);r.push({x,y,w,h});}}}return r;}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette.bg;const fg=window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor;background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const cellW=600/8,cellH=360/5,pad=6;const heroCard={x:0,y:0,w:5,h:3};const growthCard={x:5,y:0,w:3,h:3};const labelCard1={x:0,y:3,w:2,h:2};const labelCard2={x:2,y:3,w:3,h:2};const labelCard3={x:5,y:3,w:3,h:2};const cards=[heroCard,growthCard,labelCard1,labelCard2,labelCard3];const labels=['$3.4M','+127%','Q3 Record','Year over Year','Strongest Quarter'];const icons=['chart-bar','arrow-up','star','clock','lightning'];const fontSizes=[64,44,16,16,15];for(let ci=0;ci<cards.length;ci++){const c=cards[ci];const px=c.x*cellW+pad,py=c.y*cellH+pad,pw=c.w*cellW-pad*2,ph=c.h*cellH-pad*2;noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],80);strokeWeight(1.5);rect(px,py,pw,ph,10);noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);textFont('Inter');textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);if(ci===0){drawingContext.font='900 '+fontSizes[ci]+'px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('$3.4M',px+pw/2,py+ph*0.45);drawingContext.font='500 14px Inter';drawingContext.fillText('Revenue',px+pw/2,py+ph*0.78);}else if(ci===1){fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);drawAtlasIcon('arrow-up',px+pw/2,py+ph*0.28,32,'rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')');drawingContext.font='700 '+fontSizes[ci]+'px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText('+127%',px+pw/2,py+ph*0.62);drawingContext.font='400 13px Inter';drawingContext.fillText('YoY Growth',px+pw/2,py+ph*0.84);}else{const iconName=icons[ci];drawAtlasIcon(iconName,px+pw/2,py+ph*0.30,28,'rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')');drawingContext.font='600 '+fontSizes[ci]+'px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillText(labels[ci],px+pw/2,py+ph*0.68);}};drawingContext.font='400 11px Inter';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',0.45)';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillText('Strongest quarter on record',300,348);}
